description: Configure a multi-channel visual projection system for a maritime simulator by creating three configuration files (visual_left.ini, visual_center.ini, and visual_right.ini) in /home/ga/Documents/config_deployment/ using /opt/bridgecommand/bc5.ini as a base. The system must provide a 150-degree total horizontal field of view distributed equally across the three channels. For each file, set the appropriate view_angle and look_rotation (Center at 0, Left negative, Right positive), and configure network_slave=1, server_ip=192.168.10.5, screen_width=1920, screen_height=1080, and fullscreen=1. All other keys from the template must be preserved.
